Recent updates include a bomb threat at a Manhattan hospital by a former Sloan Kettering employee, increased police patrols at Jewish sites following a synagogue attack, and the arrest of a couple for an alleged sex trafficking ring in New York.

### Risks & Alerts

- Sloan Kettering ex-employee arrested for making bomb threat at Manhattan hospital. - Popular N.J. park suddenly closed due to ‘unstable ground.’ [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
